title: Phase 0: Core documentation (PLAN, PROGRESS, DECISIONS, RISKS)
description: Create the foundational project documentation files: PLAN.md (build plan overview), PROGRESS.md (phase tracking), DECISIONS.md (architectural decision records), and RISKS.md (risk register with mitigations). These docs set the stage for all implementation work.
steps: Create docs/ directory if not exists
Write docs/PLAN.md with build plan overview referencing PRD
Write docs/PROGRESS.md with phase tracking template (all phases listed, status: NOT_STARTED)
Write docs/DECISIONS.md with ADR template and initial architecture decisions
Write docs/RISKS.md with risk register covering technical, operational, and integration risks
